title: Alternative Stained Glass
description: Alternative stained-glass blocks for Minecraft Forge 1.7.10.
body:
![Alternative Stained Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/971e601b7de4345be4224c4c98ffa0a334aca0ee.png)

# Minecraft Forge 1.7.10 mod

Add 16 color alternative stained-glass blocks.

- Blocks
- Panes
- Horizontal Panes

![All blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9f13d1bb4f68988e0daa96ecafc9ae247516a98.png)

# REQUIRES

- Minecraft 1.7.10
- Forge 10.13.4.1614

# OPTIONAL (Connected Textures)

- OptiFine (Tested in [OptiFine 1.7.10 HD U D4](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.7.10_HD_U_D4.jar))
- [Alternative Stained Glass Connect (Resource Pack)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alternative-stained-glass-connect)
